evals.prompt: I have a papers.json at /tmp/lit-vault-eval0/papers.json with papers I found on quantum chemistry methods. Please import them to my vault as notes using /lit-vault --papers /tmp/lit-vault-eval0/papers.json --dry-run --no-full-text
evals.expected_output: Prints 3 well-formed vault notes (the 3 included papers; 2 excluded papers skipped). Each note must have correct YAML frontmatter (status: Seed, type: Paper), verbatim abstract section, summary section, key points skeleton, and Galaxy link suggestions commented out. Final report shows 3 imported, 2 skipped.

assertions.name: correct-paper-count
assertions.description: Exactly 3 notes printed (only included papers with score >= 3); 2 excluded papers skipped

assertions.name: frontmatter-fields-present
assertions.description: Each note has: status: Seed, type: Paper, subject, doi or arxiv, year, venue, citations, full_text_available

assertions.name: abstract-verbatim-section
assertions.description: Each note has '## Abstract (verbatim)' section with abstract text copied exactly from input papers.json

assertions.name: galaxy-suggestions-commented
assertions.description: At least one note has Galaxy link suggestions in commented-out [[double bracket]] format: <!--[[concept]]-->

assertions.name: todo-callout-present
assertions.description: Each note contains the '> [!todo]' callout with the read-and-annotate task

assertions.name: key-points-skeleton
assertions.description: Each note has '## Key points' section with Methods/Key result/Limitations/Open questions fields

evals.prompt: Import the papers at /tmp/lit-vault-eval1/papers.json to my vault, using my PhD-Ch1-AIM4ML project context. Run: /lit-vault --papers /tmp/lit-vault-eval1/papers.json --project PhD-Ch1-AIM4ML --dry-run --no-full-text
evals.expected_output: Prints notes with project-framed summaries (each summary mentions PhD-Ch1-AIM4ML or explicitly states why paper is relevant to the project). Frontmatter includes project: [PhD-Ch1-AIM4ML]. Memory update step attempts to find/update project memory file.

assertions.name: project-framed-summary
assertions.description: At least one note Summary section contains 'PhD-Ch1-AIM4ML' or 'relevant to' or 'relevant for'

assertions.name: memory-update-attempted
assertions.description: Skill attempts to locate project memory file and update/append Paper pool section

evals.prompt: Import papers from /tmp/lit-vault-eval2/papers.json but only the high-quality ones: /lit-vault --papers /tmp/lit-vault-eval2/papers.json --threshold 4 --dry-run --no-full-text
evals.expected_output: Only papers with screening_score >= 4 AND screening_status=included are imported. Papers with score < 4 or excluded status are skipped. Report accurately shows correct counts.

assertions.name: threshold-filtering-correct
assertions.description: Only papers with screening_score >= 4 are included in output; papers with score 1-3 or excluded status are skipped

assertions.name: skipped-count-reported
assertions.description: Final report shows number of skipped papers (those below threshold or excluded)

assertions.name: filename-convention
assertions.description: At least one note header/filename follows pattern: firstauthorlastname+year+keyword (e.g., 'smith2023-qtaim' or similar)
